creator: wildzander@gmail.com
text:
Appendix:
By pressing the "PrintScreen" key, the tty are switched sequentially, namely: ttyv0 > ttyv1 > ttyv2 > ttyv3 > ttyv4 > ttyv5 > ttyv6 > ttyv7. Then the key does nothing. 
Pressing F5 displays " 5˜ ", pressing F6 displays " 7˜ ", pressing F7 displays " 8˜ ", pressing F8 displays " 9˜ ", pressing F9 displays " 0˜ ", pressing F10 displays " 1˜ ", pressing F11 displays " 3˜ " and pressing F12 displays " 4˜ ".
The other keys work correctly. At least I have not detected another error.
